PEC-411: This email is already registered. Please log in or use a different email.
PEC-412: Your account is not yet verified. Please enter the code sent to your email.
PEC-413: Invalid or expired verification code. Please try again or request a new code.
PEC-414: Too many code requests. Please wait a moment before requesting a new code.
PEC-421: You have reached the maximum number of pending bookings. Please update or cancel an existing booking request.
PEC-500: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
